bead.title: Pre-refactor baseline: pin CONTRACT-003 JSON fixtures and runtime baseline; grep cmd/ and root for hidden per-harness imports

bead.acceptance:
1. testdata/contract-003/pre-refactor/ contains JSON fixtures for HarnessInfo, ProviderInfo, QuotaState, AccountStatus across all five harnesses and one subscription-backed provider
2. grep -rEn 'internal/harnesses/(claude|codex|gemini|opencode|pi)' --include='*.go' . (excluding the harness packages, node_modules, .claude/worktrees, benchmark-results, .ddx) is captured verbatim in the PR description; any file not in the plan's Service-side consumers or Tests inventory tables is added
3. testdata/perf-baselines/2026-05-14-pre-refactor.txt records go test -count=1 ./... -timeout 30m wall time
4. go test ./... -count=1 passes with fixtures committed
